opportunities.title: [HIRING] 2D stick-figure animator for YouTube explainer videos. $15-20 an hour. Long-term
opportunities.description:
[HIRING] 2D stick-figure animator for YouTube explainer videos. $15-20 an hour. Long-term

We make hand-drawn 2D explainer videos about historical and current mysteries, simple stick-figure style, voiceover-driven. We're looking for someone long-term to handle the visuals. You'd get a voiceover and script, and your job is to turn it into visuals. The workflow is usually a mix of AI generation and light animation. not high-FPS animation.
